_comment: Your real profile — used for auto-filling job applications.

professional.title: Full Stack Developer
professional.summary: Full Stack Developer with nearly 4 years of experience building scalable, production-grade SaaS platforms and high-traffic systems using Node.js, Express, React, Next.js, MongoDB, and MySQL. Backend-focused engineer with hands-on ownership of multi-tenant architectures, secure REST APIs, real-time systems, background job processing, and cloud deployments on GCP and AWS.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer (Remote)
experience.description: Developing and maintaining backend systems for a high-scale mobile application serving millions of users on AWS. Building and optimizing APIs using Node.js, Next.js, and MongoDB. Contributing to scalable backend architecture, performance optimization, and data modeling for large user bases. Implemented authentication, authorization, and secure data access patterns. Designed and developed OmniAiFlow, a B2B SaaS omnichannel communication platform enabling unified customer interactions across WhatsApp, Email, and SMS with AI-powered automation workflows.

experience.title: Backend / Full Stack Developer (Remote)
experience.description: Lead backend engineer and system owner for Huscribe, a SaaS platform used by thousands of users to automate Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics 365, Asana, Zoho, and other CRMs using AI agents. Architected a scalable Node.js & Express backend with MongoDB on Google Cloud Platform. Built secure REST APIs, webhook processors, and background job pipelines using cron-based workers. Implemented JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, and tenant isolation. Designed data processing pipelines to ingest, normalize, and synchronize data across third-party platforms. Improved reliability and performance through async job processing, query optimization, and structured logging.

experience.title: Backend Developer
experience.description: Built and maintained scalable server-side applications using Node.js and Express. Designed and managed MongoDB databases, ensuring data integrity, performance, and security. Deployed applications on AWS (EC2, S3) and handled production configurations. Implemented authentication, authorization, and RESTful APIs for multiple products. Worked closely with frontend, QA, and product teams to ship reliable, production-grade features.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer (Internship)
experience.description: Worked on full stack development using the MERN stack and Python/Django. Developed frontend features using JavaScript and React and backend APIs using Node.js. Contributed to database design, API development, and UI integration.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Education (B.S. Ed)

projects.name: OmniAiFlow
projects.description: B2B SaaS omnichannel communication platform to manage customer interactions across WhatsApp, Email, and SMS from a single interface.

projects.name: Huscribe
projects.description: SaaS CRM automation platform that automates Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics 365, Asana, Zoho, and other CRMs using AI agents.

projects.name: WordSnap
projects.description: Gaming backend application developed with scalable Node.js API architecture and deployed on AWS.

projects.name: Global Price Localizer API
projects.description: Public API to calculate global prices including taxes and duties, designed for fast and reliable price calculations.

links.coverLetterTemplate: I am Islahuddin, a Full Stack Developer with nearly 4 years of experience building scalable SaaS platforms and APIs with Node.js, React, Next.js, MongoDB, and AWS. I am excited to apply for this {job_title} position at {company}. I am immediately available for remote work across Europe, USA, Australia, and the Gulf.
